verbGlossary.LOGGED AT: {source}, daily note, or equipment timecard is recorded referencing this {target} as the work site
verbGlossary.TRACKED AT: {source}records trade presence at {target}, building, floor, or zone

verbGlossary.REQUESTED FOR: {source} identifies the work {target} or area where additional trade workers are needed
verbGlossary.CLOCKED AT: {source} entry records hours worked by an employee at a specific project {target} or building
verbGlossary.OPERATED AT: {source} entry documents that a piece of equipment was running at {target} area or zone
verbGlossary.STORED AT: {source}record identifies the laydown yard or temporary facility where a machine is parked or maintained
verbGlossary.DELIVERED TO: {source} entry documents that materials arrived at {target} or project site
verbGlossary.SHIPPED TO: {source} tracks an inbound load destined for a specific project {target} or staging area
verbGlossary.RECEIVED AT: {source} confirms acceptance of a delivery at {target} or floor level
verbGlossary.OCCURRED AT: {source}, accident, or incident is recorded as having taken place at {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTED AT: {source} entry documents a quality or safety check performed at {target}, floor, or compartment
verbGlossary.RECORDED AT: {source} entry captures conditions observed at the project {target} or exterior zone

verbGlossary.MEASURED AT: {source} or completion metric is calculated for {target}, zone, or building
verbGlossary.TALLIED AT: {source} entry records installed-in-place volumes at {target}, zone, room, or wall surface
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIED AT: {source} captures real output measured at {target} level
verbGlossary.PLANNED FOR: Budgeted production quantity sets {target} or building for planning purposes
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AT: {source} productivity record compares trade output against norms scoped to {target} or building
verbGlossary.DISPOSED AT: {source} entry records debris removal from {target} or project site
verbGlossary.HAULED FROM: {source} tracks a debris load removed from {target} or exterior zone
verbGlossary.CHECKED IN AT: {source} entry records arrival of an inspector, owner rep, or specialist at the project {target} or field office
verbGlossary.PLANNED AT: Scheduled work log entry assigns upcoming work activities to {target}, zone, or building
verbGlossary.LINKED TO: Scheduled work task link connects a field activity to a CPM schedule activity at a specific work {target}
verbGlossary.SUMMARIZED AT: {source} entry aggregates daily field activity for a specific project {target} or building
verbGlossary.COORDINATED AT: {source} documents a coordination call referencing activities at the project {target}
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED AT: Plan revision receipt confirms updated dra{target}s were issued for a specific building or floor
verbGlossary.BILLED AT: T&M ticket records billable work performed at {target} or room
verbGlossary.WORKED AT: T&M labor entry records hours for corrective or extra work performed at {target} or room
verbGlossary.INSTALLED AT: T&M material entry records material placement at {target} or space
verbGlossary.COMPILED FOR: {source} packages all field log entries for the project {target} into a stakeholder summary
verbGlossary.CONFIGURED FOR: {source} {target} configuration defines which log sections are active for the project site
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED FOR: {source} rate tracks notification delivery to stakeholders for the project {target}
verbGlossary.COUNTED AT: {source} captures maximum workers present at a project {target} or building
verbGlossary.AVERAGED AT: Average daily headcount metric computes mean workforce {target} at the project site over a period
verbGlossary.RATED AT: Utilization, weather delay, or waste diversion rate is calculated at the project {target} level
verbGlossary.GAUGED AT: Plan percent complete metric evaluates progress within a specific work {target} or phase area
